1.title: Open Surface Coating Thickness Evaluation Panel

content.text: System shall open a right-side panel when the user clicks the Surface Coating Thickness test from the Rules and Action → Testing list.
the evaluation panel to open when I select the Surface Coating Thickness test
I can review the evaluation model.
I am viewing the Rules and Action → Testing list,
I click the Surface Coating Thickness test,
the system opens a right-side evaluation panel.
System shall display the panel title “Surface Coating Thickness — Evaluation Model”.
the panel title displayed at the top
I know which evaluation model I am viewing.
the system displays the title “Surface Coating Thickness — Evaluation Model”.
System shall display the Local scope label beside the test title.
the Local scope label displayed beside the test title
I know the scope of the rule.
the evaluation panel header is displayed,
the system shows the Local scope label.
System shall display a description “Verification of proactive coating thickness against design specification.”
a description explaining the test purpose
I understand what the evaluation verifies.
the system displays the text “Verification of proactive coating thickness against design specification.”
System shall display the Measurement Principles section describing the coating measurement guidelines.
the system shows the Measurement Principle section.
System shall indicate that a minimum of three coating thickness readings are required for evaluation.
see the requirement for multiple readings
the Measurement Principle section is visible,
the system indicates that at least three coating thickness readings are required.
System shall specify that measurement should be taken from flat surface areas. – “Flat area selection”
the guideline indicating measurement should be taken from flat surfaces
the system specifies that readings should be taken from flat surface areas.

8.title: Display Edge and Weld Avoidance Instruction

content.text: System shall indicate – “Avoid edges and welds” during measurement.
see instructions to avoid edges and welds
the system indicates that edges and welds should be avoided during measurement.
System shall indicate that the minimum reading governs the durability assessment.
the system to indicate that the minimum reading governs durability assessment
the most conservative measurement determines evaluation.
the system indicates that the minimum reading governs durability assessment.
System shall display the Thickness Calculation section.
I understand how coating thickness evaluation is performed.
the system displays the Thickness Calculation section.
System shall calculate minimum thickness (tmin) as the minimum value from all recorded readings.
the system to calculate the minimum thickness
the lowest measured value is identified.
it calculates tmin as the minimum value among all readings.
System shall calculate the Coating Thickness Ratio (CR) using the formula CR = tmin / tdesign.
the system to calculate the coating thickness ratio
the measurement can be compared with the design specification.
tmin and tdesign values are available,
the system calculates CR = tmin / tdesign.
System shall display a note indicating that Design thickness is derived from coating specification.
see a note explaining the source of design thickness
I understand where the reference value comes from.
the Thickness Calculation section is displayed,
the system indicates that design thickness is derived from coating specification.
System shall display the Acceptance Criteria section.
I understand the severity classification rules.
the system shows the Acceptance Criteria section.
System shall define Green condition when CR ≥ 0.80.
I know when coating thickness meets acceptable limits.
coating thickness ratio values are evaluated,
the system defines it as CR ≥ 0.80.
System shall define Amber condition when 0.60 ≤ CR < 0.80.
I know when coating thickness requires monitoring.
coating thickness ratio values are evaluated,
the system defines it as 0.60 ≤ CR < 0.80.
System shall define Red condition when CR < 0.60.
I know when coating thickness is critically low.
coating thickness ratio values are evaluated,
the system defines it as CR < 0.60.
System shall visually represent severity levels using color indicators (Green, Amber, Red).
I can quickly identify severity levels.
the system shows color indicators for Green, Amber, and Red.
System shall display the Governing Rule section indicating that the “minimum measured thickness governs classification.”
see the governing rule explaining classification logic
I understand how severity is determined.
the system displays a Governing Rule section stating that the minimum measured thickness governs classification.
System shall display the System Defined label indicating the evaluation model is not editable by users.
I understand the evaluation model cannot be edited.
the system displays a “System Defined” label.
System shall provide a Close button to close the evaluation panel.
a Close button available in the panel
I can exit the evaluation view.
the system provides a Close button.
System shall provide a close (X) icon in the top-right corner to close the panel.
a close (X) icon in the panel header
I can quickly dismiss the panel.
the system shows a close (X) icon in the top-right corner.

23.title: Return to Testing List After Closing Panel

content.text: System shall return the user to the Rules and Action → Testing list after closing the panel.
the system to return me to the Rules and Action → Testing list after closing the panel
I can continue reviewing other tests.
I click the Close button or close (X) icon,
the system closes the panel and returns to the Rules and Action → Testing list.
